2606.09577.title: Code Is More Than Text: Uncertainty Estimation for Code Generation
2606.09577.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as code generators, where silently wrong programs pose real safety and reliability risks. Reliable uncertainty estimation (UE) is essential for selective prediction, human-in-the-loop review, and downstream agentic decisions. Yet most existing code UE methods are inherited from natural language (NL) generation and ignore properties that make code distinct. We argue that code differs from NL in three ways: a single wrong token can break an entire program (token fragility); algorithmic intent and concrete implementation can disagree independently (intent-code gap); and programs can be executed (executability). We instantiate these properties as three orthogonal uncertainty axes: lexical (Top-K token entropy), algorithmic (pseudo-code consistency), and functional (behavioral consistency). Across five code LLMs, our three-axis ensemble improves average AUROC from 0.696 for the strongest NL-derived baseline to 0.776 (+8.1 points). Notably, on Qwen3-14B, our single-pass Top-K token entropy matches the strongest multi-pass baseline while being over 3x cheaper; across models, it remains a competitive low-cost signal. These results suggest that code UE deserves code-specific design rather than direct NL ports.
2606.09577.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地被用作程式碼生成器，其中靜默錯誤的程式可能帶來實際的安全性和可靠性風險。可靠的不確定性估計（UE）對於選擇性預測、人類參與的審查以及下游的代理決策至關重要。然而，大多數現有的程式碼 UE 方法都是從自然語言（NL）生成中繼承而來，並忽略了使程式碼獨特的特性。我們認為程式碼與 NL 有三個不同之處：單一錯誤的標記可以使整個程式崩潰（標記脆弱性）；算法意圖和具體實現可以獨立地不一致（意圖-程式碼差距）；以及程式可以被執行（可執行性）。我們將這些特性實例化為三個正交的不確定性軸：詞彙（Top-K 標記熵）、算法（偽程式碼一致性）和功能（行為一致性）。在五個程式碼 LLM 中，我們的三軸集成將平均 AUROC 從最強 NL 衍生基準的 0.696 提升至 0.776 (+8.1 分)。值得注意的是，在 Qwen3-14B 上，我們的單通過 Top-K 標記熵與最強的多通過基準相匹配，同時成本低於 3 倍；在各模型中，它仍然是一個具有競爭力的低成本信號。這些結果表明，程式碼 UE 值得進行特定於程式碼的設計，而不是直接的 NL 移植。
2606.09577.author: Yuling Shi et.al.
2606.09577.authors: Yuling Shi, Caiqi Zhang, Yuexian Li, Haopeng Wang, Yeheng Chen, Nigel Collier, Xiaodong Gu
